creator: wxs@FreeBSD.org
text:
On Fri, Jan 02, 2009 at 10:50:05PM +0000, bf wrote:
> The following reply was made to PR ports/129817; it has been noted by GNATS.
> 
> From: bf <bf2006a@yahoo.com>
> To: bug-followup@FreeBSD.org, zr2t-kzk@asahi-net.or.jp, wxs@FreeBSD.org
> Cc:  
> Subject: Re: ports/129817: math/R ports can't compile with WITHOUT_X11 option
> Date: Fri, 2 Jan 2009 14:40:39 -0800 (PST)
> 
>  --0-68087600-1230936039=:46767
>  Content-Type: text/plain; charset=us-ascii
>  
>  Although I don't now have the means to test it, this seems to have
>  been fixed in R 2.8.1; I will submit a patch to update the port to
>  that version soon, after I return from the holidays.  In the
>  meantime, you could try the attached patch.

The update to 2.8.1 is in ports/129863 which is currently awaiting your
approval.

http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=ports/129863

I've run it through a tinderbox and it's fine as far as I'm concerned.
Please approve that one when you get a chance and I'll get it committed.

-- WXS
